Testimonials Archive – Minimal

Testimonials without filters, search, or per-page controls. Tests private CPT rendering with no links, blockquote display.

What People Are Saying

Emily Rodriguez, Alumni

Computer Science

IGNITE gave me more than just technical skills. It taught me leadership, teamwork, and resilience. These are the qualities that set me apart in my career.

Emily Rodriguez, Alumni

Computer Science

IGNITE gave me more than just technical skills. It taught me leadership, teamwork, and resilience. These are the qualities that set me apart in my career.

Jordan Williams, Current Student

Business Administration

Every day at IGNITE feels like an investment in my future. The community here is unlike anything I have experienced. We support each other and grow together.

Sarah Chen, Class of 2023

Hotel and Restaurant Operation Management

I was struggling to find my path until I discovered IGNITE. The program gave me the confidence and skills I needed. Now I manage a five-star restaurant kitchen.

Marcus Johnson, Class of 2024

Computer Science

The hands-on learning experience at IGNITE prepared me for the real world. I landed my dream job within months of graduating. The professors and mentors made all the difference.

Priya Patel, Parent

Business Administration

As a parent, knowing my daughter had access to IGNITE resources gave me peace of mind. The team is incredibly responsive and truly cares about student success.

Alex Rivera, Class of 2025

Hotel and Restaurant Operation Management

IGNITE completely changed my college experience. The support I received helped me stay on track and graduate with honors. I could not have done it without them.

Blog Archive – Long Content (Edge Case)

Tests overflow handling with extremely long heading and description text. Verifies text truncation/wrapping behavior.

This Is An Intentionally Very Long Eyebrow Text To Test Overflow

This Is An Intentionally Very Long Heading Text That Exceeds One Hundred Characters to Test How the Layout Handles Overflow and Line Wrapping in the Archive Block Heading Area

This is a very long description text that is intended to test how the archive block handles excessive content in the description area. It should gracefully wrap and not break the two-column layout. The description continues with more text to push well past the typical content length. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris.

A Very Long Button Label That Tests Overflow Second Button

Resources Archive – Preset Filters (Filters Hidden)

Tests presetFilters with displayFilters=false: preset filters still narrow the query results but no filter UI or active pill bar is shown. Users see a pre-filtered archive with no visible controls.
